dimensions.evidence: The plugin root includes skills, agents, commands, and docs folders.
The manifest is parseable but omits the support contact field.
Component inventory count matches the generated ledger.
A shell hook runs without a deterministic offline guard.
Every referenced file exists under the plugin repository.
Two examples mention tokens without redaction evidence.

dimensions.reason: Content audit source files were not included in the review bundle.

priority_actions.action: Add an offline hook validator and block shell hooks without strict mode.
Replace token examples with redacted fixtures and record the evidence.
Add the support contact field and rerun manifest validation.

reduced_scope.note: The score excludes content because the source bundle omitted content files.

guardian.reason: The scorecard is valid but excludes one declared dimension.
